summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SignalAI MVP - AI news curator with hype scoring. Backend APIs working well (95.5% success rate), frontend fully functional with excellent navigation and UI components. Main limitation: Check This URL feature has content extraction issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 400 error when trying to extract content from URLs
flaky_endpoints.impact: Check This URL analyzer feature not working for real URLs

integration_issues.issue: UI shows loading state but backend returns 400 error for URL content extraction

passed_tests: Homepage loads with SignalAI branding and Check This input
AI News Feed section displays correctly with filter tabs
Navigation works between all pages (Feed, Predictions, Digest)
Hype score filter tabs functional (All, Low Hype, Opinion, High Hype)
Prediction Graveyard page loads with filter tabs
Stats endpoint returns hype distribution data
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Check This URL content extraction - the /api/check-url endpoint returns 400 errors when trying to extract content from real URLs. This affects the core 'Check This' feature. May need to debug newspaper3k library or add better error handling for content extraction.
